final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a product launch campaign featuring 长安起源Q06.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, visually striking presentation-cover aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a large hero background image with title and subtitle overlaid in a brand-aligned hierarchy
Subject: must include 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a grand, immersive backdrop — exact environment and depth treatment are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source mix and intensity are yours
Color palette: needs a direction that feels premium and brand-coherent for 长安起源Q06 — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of translucency and visual depth in the background — exact layering and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (large, primary title), "9月正式上市" (subtitle)
Constraints: must follow PPT cover proportions (16:9 landscape); title and subtitle must be legible against the background
Avoid:
